page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the arm64-based Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 processor. This instance features 4 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, operating at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz. It is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The processor includes 64 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 64 MB of L3 cache. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average performance across standard compute and memory tasks. The single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests yield average results of 1819.78 and 7230.46, respectively. Memory bandwidth is measured at 407.26 GB/sec for small cached blocks, dropping to 63.39 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. The instance demonstrates average performance in database operations, static web serving throughput at 6.51 GB/sec, and Redis SET operations at 6.71 million operations per second. However, cryptographic performance is a notable tradeoff, with the PassMark CPU encryption test scoring in the poor category at 659.83. Large language model inference is also limited, with text generation on a 7B model scoring a poor 4.54 tokens per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g8y.xlarge offers a balanced resource profile suitable for general-purpose workloads that do not require specialized hardware accelerators or intensive cryptographic processing. The dedicated arm64 cores provide predictable performance for multi-threaded decompression, web serving, and database operations. This instance is best suited for application servers, microservices, static web hosting, and lightweight database workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated arm64 physical cores powered by the Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It is configured with 16.0 GB of RAM, 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no local storage or GPU. Performance benchmarks show average capabilities for general computing, with stress-ng multi-core scoring 7230.46 and Redis SET operations reaching 6.71 million operations per second. However, cryptographic performance is weak, as indicated by a poor PassMark encryption score of 659.83. The instance offers a balanced resource density, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads like static web serving, lightweight database operations, and general application hosting, while remaining less suitable for encryption-heavy tasks or large language model inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.xlarge is an arm64 general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated Yitian710 cores, 16 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps bandwidth, delivering balanced performance for web serving and databases.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.xlarge is an arm64 general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated Yitian710 cores, 16 GB RAM, and average database performance.
tagline: An arm64-based general-purpose instance offering dedicated physical cores and balanced memory for web serving and lightweight database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 arm64 processor with 4 dedicated physical cores.
Equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM and 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
Delivers average performance for Redis SET operations and static web serving.
Tradeoffs include poor cryptographic performance and weak LLM inference speeds.
Best suited for general-purpose application hosting, microservices, and lightweight databases.
